prestazioni: Upgrade the GM-sourced **LEA 2.0L I4 (E85 flex-fuel) range-extender engine** with a **Bosch Motorsport MED17.1.6 ECU reflash** optimized for E85 (85% ethanol) to extract **350+ WHP** (up from 260 WHP) via a **custom turbocharger swap** using a **Garrett GT2867R .86 A/R turbo** paired with a **Tial MV-R 44mm external wastegate** and **Precision Turbo 46mm blow-off valve**.

Replace the stock **A123 Systems 20kWh lithium-ion battery pack** with a **custom 30kWh high-voltage battery** using **LG Chem JH3 cells** (3.7V, 3,400mAh) in a **108s3p configuration**, paired with a **Brusa NLG664 high-power charger** (22kW) to reduce charge times by 40% while increasing electric-only range to **120 miles (EPA est.)**.

Install a **KW Suspensions Clubsport 3-way adjustable coilover kit** (Fisker-specific valving) with **Eibach ERS race springs (800 lb/in front, 600 lb/in rear)** and **SuperPro poly bushings (part #SPF1000)** to eliminate subframe flex, paired with **AP Racing 380mm 6-piston front brake calipers** and **Ferodo DS2500 pads** for track-ready stopping power.
estetica: Apply a **full Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (Fisker Karma-specific)** with **carbon fiber fenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser**, extending track width by **3.5 inches** and requiring **custom 5x114.3 wheel spacers (15mm front, 25mm rear)** for aggressive stance.

Replace the stock **LED taillight clusters** with **Lux Hella 500-series sequential turn signals** (OEM-style housing retrofit) and **Morimoto XB LED headlights (5500K, 3000 lumen)** with **custom DRL halos** wired to the **Bosch MED17 ECU for dynamic brightness control**.

Install a **Vorsteiner V-FF107 forged carbon fiber roof panel** (weight savings: 8.5 lbs) and **custom 22-inch HRE FF03 wheels (9.5J front, 11J rear)** in **Gloss Black with brushed titanium accents**, wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (265/30R22 front, 295/25R22 rear)** for maximum grip.
